name: bidder
description: Compute bidder for market contract testing

private-key-hex.description: Secp256k1 private key hex for the bidder DID

plc-directory-url.description: PLC directory URL for DID registration

registry-endpoint.description: AT Protocol relay URL for market registry registration (requestCrawl)

atproto-handle.description: AT Protocol handle for remote PDS login

atproto-password.description: AT Protocol password for remote PDS login

atproto-pds-url.description: AT Protocol PDS URL for remote login

compute-provider-local-container-mode.description: Local provider mode: vm or container

worker-permission-mode.description: Worker permission policy: deny-all (default) or allow-net

no-xrpc-relay.description: Disable XRPC relay on main serve

rfp-firehose-mode.description: Firehose to watch for new RFP records: subscriberepos, jetstream, or off

rfp-firehose-url.description: Firehose websocket URL to watch for RFP records (relay subscribeRepos base, or jetstream subscribe base)

no-qr.description: Skip QR code display and association prompt

private-key-hex-path.description: Path to load/save the Secp256k1 private key hex. Creates file with generated key if missing. Overridden by --private-key-hex if both set.

pds-state-path.description: Path for PDS state persistence (Deno.Kv SQLite). Makes badgeBlueKeys associations survive restarts.

accept-scope.description: Accept jobs from scope: only_me, direct_network, policy_based, or open (default)

offering-refresh-sec.description: Seconds between offering record re-commits to stay discoverable (0 to disable)
